Simulate incidence from a Poisson process

simulate_poisson_process.Rd

Draws Poisson realizations given expected incidence values.

Usage

simulate_poisson_process(expected_incidence, n_sims = 1L, seed = NULL)

Arguments

expected_incidence

Numeric vector of expected incidence values.

n_sims

Number of simulations.

seed

Optional random seed.

Value

A tibble with simulation id, day index, expected incidence, and simulated incidence.
